tasks.subject: Task 0: Scaffold subsystem + register settings
tasks.description:
Scaffold AnimationFx singleton, register world + client settings, wire into vagabond-crawler.mjs.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/animation-fx.mjs","scripts/animation-fx-defaults.mjs","scripts/vagabond-crawler.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"foundry-mcp: evaluate subsystem presence","acceptanceCriteria":["game.vagabondCrawler.animationFx singleton present","settings registered","no console errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Port default preset data
tasks.description:
Port weapons/skill-fallbacks/alchemical/gear defaults from vagabond-item-fx; add NPC action starter presets under unified {hit, miss} schema.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/animation-fx-defaults.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"foundry-mcp: getConfig() preset counts","acceptanceCriteria":[">=10 weapons",">=7 npcActions","torch persist true"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Implement the resolver
tasks.description:
_resolve(source) handles item path + NPC action path with override flags and fallback chains.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/animation-fx.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"foundry-mcp: _resolve against live compendium NPCs","acceptanceCriteria":["weapon by pattern","alchemical exact/partial/default","NPC action matched","override flag wins"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Implement playback
tasks.description:
_play handles onToken/projectile/cone, hit/miss block selection, persistent toggle, sound, multi-target stagger.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/animation-fx.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"foundry-mcp: _play on selected token","acceptanceCriteria":["all 3 types render","persist toggles","miss no-ops when absent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Chat message hook (item path)
tasks.description:
createChatMessage hook for weapon/alchemical/gear. Gates on userId + enabled + flags. Determines outcome.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/animation-fx.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"manual: roll weapon attack in-game","acceptanceCriteria":["animation plays on hit","only acting user","spells/armor skipped"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: NPC action chat flag emission + wrapper
tasks.description:
Wrap VagabondChatCard.npcAction to emit flags.vagabond.actionIndex if system doesn't already.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/animation-fx.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"foundry-mcp: trigger NPC action, inspect message flags","acceptanceCriteria":["actionIndex present in chat message flags","no double-wrap"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Retire cone patch in npc-abilities.mjs
tasks.description:
Remove VagabondItemSequencer.play cone wrap; rely on unified AnimationFx playback.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/npc-abilities.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"manual: breath action still animates","acceptanceCriteria":["cone wrap removed","breath animation still plays","other npc-abilities wraps intact"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Config window skeleton + Settings tab
tasks.description:
AnimationFxConfigApp skeleton with tab strip, Settings tab wired up, open() invokes it, settings menu entry registered.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/animation-fx-config.mjs","templates/animation-fx-config.hbs","scripts/animation-fx.mjs","scripts/vagabond-crawler.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"foundry-mcp: open() renders window","acceptanceCriteria":["window opens","all 6 tabs present","Settings tab saves"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Preset tabs with hit/miss editor
tasks.description:
Full preset row editor across 5 category tabs: add/delete preset, hit/miss blocks, file/sound pickers, preview, smart-default types.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/animation-fx-config.mjs","templates/animation-fx-config.hbs"],"verifyCommand":"manual: edit preset, save, reload, verify persisted","acceptanceCriteria":["edits persist","add/delete works","preview plays","file picker works","reset tab"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Per-item + per-action override dialogs
tasks.description:
Item sheet header button + NPC sheet action-row button, both open override dialog writing to flags.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/animation-fx.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"manual: set override on sword, see custom animation","acceptanceCriteria":["item sheet button appears","NPC action button appears","overrides resolved correctly"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: CSS styling
tasks.description:
vcfx- prefixed styles with hit/miss accent colors, light/dark theme support.

```json:metadata
{"files":["styles/vagabond-crawler.css"],"verifyCommand":"visual inspection of config window in both themes","acceptanceCriteria":["tabs styled","preset rows styled","hit green miss red accents","light theme works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: CrawlBar integration + full verification
tasks.description:
Add Animation FX button to CrawlBar tool picker, run full spec testing matrix, update CLAUDE.md file map.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/crawl-bar.mjs","CLAUDE.md"],"verifyCommand":"run all 7 scenarios from spec Testing section","acceptanceCriteria":["CrawlBar button opens config","all 7 test scenarios pass","CLAUDE.md updated"]}
```
